    • Uses of ModelObject in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory with parameters of type ModelObject 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Figure FigureFactory.createFigureFor(UUID viewID, G graph, ModelObject object, float x, float y)
      Create a node figure for the given object at the specified position.
      Figure FigureFactory.createFigureFor(UUID viewID, G graph, ModelObject object, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2)
      Create an edge figure for the given object between the specified points.
      Figure FigureFactory.createFigureFor(UUID viewID, Rectangle2f documentRect, G graph, ModelObject object)
      Create a figure for the given object and try to put it in the best position.
      Figure AbstractFigureFactory.createFigureFor(UUID viewID, Rectangle2f documentRect, G graph, ModelObject object)
      Create a figure for the given object and try to put it in the best position.
      SubFigure FigureFactory.createSubFigureInside(UUID viewID, G graph, Figure parent, ModelObject object)
      Create a sub figure for the given model object inside the given figure.

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure with type parameters of type ModelObject 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractModelObjectFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.
      interface  ModelObjectFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This interface represents the model element figures.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected void AbstractModelObjectFigure.createFigureFor(ModelObject modelObject)
      Notifies listeners about the request to create a graphical representation.

    • Uses of ModelObject in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

      Subinterfaces of ModelObject in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      interface  Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the connection point that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      interface  Edge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject class for representing edges between anchors.
      interface  Graph<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for graph models.
      interface  Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.
      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism that implement ModelObject 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractAnchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the Anchor that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      class  AbstractEdge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject classe for representing edges between anchors.
      class  AbstractModelObject
      This is the semantic object that composes a graph model.
      class  AbstractNode<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ModelObject ModelObject.findModelObject(UUID id)
      Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id.

      Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id.

      Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id.
      ModelObject AbstractAnchor.findModelObject(UUID id)
      Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id.

      Replies the added object.
      ModelObject ViewBinding.getModelObject()
      Replies the binded model object.
      ModelObject ModelObjectEvent.getNewContainer()
      Replies the new container.
      ModelObject ModelObjectEvent.getNewLinkedObject()
      Replies the new linked object.
      ModelObject ModelObjectEvent.getOldContainer()
      Replies the old container.
      ModelObject ModelObjectEvent.getOldLinkedObject()
      Replies the old linked object.
      ModelObject ModelObjectEvent.getRemovedObject()
      Replies the removed object.

      Notifies the listener about the addition of a component in this model object.

      Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.

      Notifies the listener about the remove of a component in this model object.

      Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.

      Notifies the listener about the change of the container of this model object.

      Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.

      Notifies the listener about the change of a link of this model object.

      Define an node with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardAnchor<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an anchor with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardEdge<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an edge with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardGraph<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define a graph with the standard implementation.
      class  StandardMonoAnchorNode<G extends StandardGraph<G,N,A,E>,N extends AbstractStandardNode<G,N,A,E>,A extends StandardAnchor<G,N,A,E>,E extends StandardEdge<G,N,A,E>>
      Define an node with at max one central anchor with the standard implementation.

    • Uses of ModelObject in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.constructs

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.constructs that implement ModelObject 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractFSMNode
      Abstract implementation for all the nodes that are composed a FSM.
      class  FiniteStateMachine
      Define a finite state machine.
      class  FSMAnchor
      Define an node's anchor in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMEndPoint
      Define an end point in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMStartPoint
      Define the start point in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMState
      Define a state in a finite state machine.
      class  FSMTransition
      Define a transition in a finite state machine.
